items.acceptance: See plan acceptance criteria: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-7.1.1-single-platform-bridge-process/plan.md. Worker must also re-verify 7.1 plan acceptance criteria (plan 第 113-119 行) are fully satisfied after this task: 1 Discord bridge process, 1 KOOK bridge process (or explicit deferral), 1 coord process, 1 agentd process per agent, bridge code does not call make_adapter().
items.verification: multinexus 269/269 pass, coord 731/731 pass, 6-process N+M topology, e2e job done in 11.6s

review.summary: Approved with documented caveats. 7.1.1 plan main goals achieved: bridge merged to 1 process per platform, agentd remains 1 process per agent. 269/269 tests pass (258 legacy + 11 new). ps shows 6 processes (1 coord + 1 discord-bridge + 4 agentd). End-to-end smoke via coord CLI request submit / agentd claim / claude CLI / report done all pass in 11.6s. KOOK bridge / cross-agent mention / Discord real-message-reply deferred per plan. Self-review caveat: codex unavailable, omp plan review was operator-authored (see review-feedback-2026-06-09-omp-plan.md); operator-needs-backlog entry filed for per-plan-criterion review checklist.

items.title: Phase 8 GitHub Automation Loop
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8-github-automation-loop/plan.md. MVP must scan own-repo GitHub issues, route them through operator triage, assign worker tasks, require the worker host to push its own branch, let coordinate verify/link/create PRs, and preserve the human merge gate.

items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8-preflight-dogfood-cleanup/plan.md. items.title: Phase 8.3.2 A0 Materialization Dogfood
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.3.2-a0-materialization-dogfood/plan.md

items.title: Phase 8.4 Worker Push And PR Creation
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.4-worker-push-pr-creation/plan.md. MVP must let a coding host's `coordinate pr publish` verify remote ref SHA via `gh api`, idempotently create-or-link a GitHub PR (with head_owner forced equal to repo owner), and forward the PublishResult JSON to `coordinate pr publish-record --result-json` so the remote DB's tasks row gets the PR URL upserted. The remote sink is record-only and never invokes `gh`. CLI must exit non-zero on push_required/publish.blocked so CI / harnessctl can fail-fast. Existing CI/review/merge gate untouched.

items.title: Phase 8.4 Closeout Dogfood And Boundary Refactor
items.acceptance: Use docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.4-closeout-dogfood-refactor/plan.md as source of truth. Complete Phase 8.4 correctness with a persistent independent reviewer loop, prove the real host/server publish path with one non-merged dogfood PR plus a fresh-host idempotent replay, and refactor the identified coordinate/multinexus boundaries without changing public CLI, event, database, or adapter contracts.

items.title: Phase 8.4.4 Host-Aware Mark-Done (Reconcile Drift)
items.acceptance: Use docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.4.4-host-aware-mark-done/plan.md as source of truth. Add mark-done-files (local checklist write, no DB) + mark-done-record (cloud DB idempotent task.done, no local file) host-aware split, mirroring materialize-files/materialize-record. Goal: operator can reconcile drift (cloud DB done but local checklist todo) without editing JSON or bare harnessctl. Non-goal: C1 generic host-aware framework (separate task). Worker: omp. Reviewer: opencode.

handoff.reason: dogfood: omp as worker, opencode as reviewer

items.verification: opencode code review approved (round-1): 1141 tests, 4 must-fix resolved, 17 tests cover Workstream A/B, no correctness bugs. omp worker implementation. Reconciled via host-aware mark-done (self-bootstrap).

items.title: Phase 8.5 Reviewer Handoff Role (reviewer 走 handoff)
items.acceptance: Use docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.5-reviewer-handoff-role/plan.md as source of truth. Let reviewer go via [handoff] role=reviewer (Discord visible, reviewer bot self-sends review), not runtime request submit. coordinate task handoff --role {worker,reviewer} + reviewer bootstrap; multinexus parses role=reviewer + reviewer [agent-report] decision. Non-goal: full role generalization. Worker: omp, reviewer: opencode.

items.title: Phase 8.6 Return Delivery (agent done → pending operator action)
items.acceptance: Use plan as source of truth. agent done → agent.reported event + pending operator action; operator queries pending to advance (no manual job list polling). Semi-auto (human stays in loop). Non-goal: full auto operator loop. Worker: omp.
items.verification: phase-8.6 回程 delivery 自举成功 (operator pending). 2 code review bug 修 (runtime dedup + action==done). 1158 tests.

items.title: Phase 8.7 Worker Self-Test Before Closeout (根因)
items.acceptance: worker closeout 前 deploy + 自举 + self_test_evidence. 解决 omp 反复没自举就 closeout 藏 bug. Worker: omp.
items.verification: #7 work (operator self-test: pending+bootstrap+evidence field). soft reminder insufficient → hard gate next task.

review.summary: ROUND-1 APPROVE with notes. Motivation is real and well-evidenced (phase-8.5/8.6 藏 bug 是 operator 实测才发现的). Root cause analysis correct: 单测覆盖不了 daemon/bridge 长进程集成 bug. Design pragmatic: 半自动 + 证据 (不硬 gate) 适合 first version (硬 gate 留后续). WS-A/B/C 范围合理 (bootstrap 协议 + packet schema + reviewer 检查). Open questions answered: (a) e2e scope = 本 task 的新链路 (per plan); (b) e2e fail → worker 修 → re-self-test → evidence 更新, 不能修就 escalate operator; (c) 首版对所有 task 应用, plan-only/refactor 由 reviewer 在 bootstrap 显式标记 skip; (d) evidence 真实性 = reviewer spot-check (e.g., ssh kook-hermes-admin cat /opt/multinexus/VERSION_DEPLOYED) + 必填 raw e2e 输出 (非 summary). Recommended edits (must-fix before closeout, not blocking implementation): edit-1 Workstream B 加 'Self-Test Failure Handling' 子节 (worker 修+re-evidence 或 escalate, 不 auto-approve with failing e2e); edit-2 self_test_evidence schema 加 raw_e2e_output 字段 (必填, 非 summary) 让 reviewer spot-check; edit-3 在 WS-A bootstrap 加 'applies_to=code_change_tasks' 标记 (plan-only/refactor 显式 skip, reviewer 看到 skip 原因). Plan ready for implementation. Dogfood (this task self-tests) noted — watch for circular dependency.
